tasks.name: Train a Skill
tasks.description: Practice a demanding discipline until your movements and judgment become more reliable.
tasks.progress_text: {task_name}: {progress_days}/{total_days} days of drills and repetition are behind you.
tasks.completion_text: {task_name} is complete. You feel readier for the next practical test.
tasks.complication_text: {task_name}: a poor lesson, injury scare, or missing mentor slows progress.

tasks.name: Research a Spell
tasks.description: Study forbidden notes, symbols, and secondhand reports without turning this into a full spell system.
tasks.progress_text: {task_name}: {progress_days}/{total_days} days of notes and cross-reference work reveal a little more.
tasks.completion_text: {task_name} is complete. You now hold a clearer theory, warning, or ritual lead for later use.
tasks.complication_text: {task_name}: a source contradicts itself, costs more time, or hints at a risk you did not expect.

tasks.name: Learn a Trade
tasks.description: Apprentice yourself briefly to pick up practical labor, etiquette, and local working knowledge.
tasks.progress_text: {task_name}: {progress_days}/{total_days} days of repetitive work start to build confidence.
tasks.completion_text: {task_name} is complete. You come away with better local understanding and a usable contact.
tasks.complication_text: {task_name}: tools break, a patron argues over terms, or the work proves harder than expected.

tasks.name: Recover from Injury
tasks.description: Rest, eat, and accept careful treatment while your body and nerves catch up with recent danger.
tasks.completion_text: {task_name} is complete. You are steadier and better prepared to return to the field.
tasks.complication_text: {task_name}: pain, cost, or restless fear makes recovery slower than planned.

tasks.name: Investigate a Rumor
tasks.description: Follow a lead through taverns, shrines, ledgers, and half-trusted witnesses.
tasks.progress_text: {task_name}: {progress_days}/{total_days} days of questions and comparisons narrow the truth.
tasks.completion_text: {task_name} is complete. The rumor is now grounded in firmer evidence or a sharper contradiction.
tasks.complication_text: {task_name}: someone notices your questions and starts steering you off course.

tasks.name: Build a Relationship
tasks.description: Spend deliberate time building trust with an NPC, group, or local household.
tasks.progress_text: {task_name}: {progress_days}/{total_days} days of conversation and favors deepen familiarity.
tasks.completion_text: {task_name} is complete. A bond, ally, or dependable introduction has taken shape.
tasks.complication_text: {task_name}: a misunderstanding, rival, or local trouble strains the connection.

tasks.name: Craft or Repair Something
tasks.description: Patch, alter, or assemble something useful without adding a full crafting ruleset.
tasks.progress_text: {task_name}: {progress_days}/{total_days} days of measured work improve the result.
tasks.completion_text: {task_name} is complete. The project is usable, reinforced, or ready for field testing.
tasks.complication_text: {task_name}: missing parts or a flawed attempt force rework.

tasks.name: Work for Coin
tasks.description: Take honest or dubious temporary work to keep your purse from running dry.
tasks.progress_text: {task_name}: {progress_days}/{total_days} days of labor earn a little standing and pay.
tasks.completion_text: {task_name} is complete. You finish the contract and leave with wages or leverage.
tasks.complication_text: {task_name}: an employer delays payment or asks for more than first promised.

tasks.name: Study a Location, Faction, or Monster
tasks.description: Review fragments, tracks, old stories, and practical reports to prepare for future action.
tasks.progress_text: {task_name}: {progress_days}/{total_days} days of focused study reveal patterns.
tasks.completion_text: {task_name} is complete. Your notes now support a stronger plan or safer approach.
tasks.complication_text: {task_name}: the subject changes, hides itself, or leaves conflicting evidence behind.

tasks.name: Maintain Equipment
tasks.description: Sort, clean, patch, and secure the gear you depend on between expeditions.
tasks.progress_text: {task_name}: {progress_days}/{total_days} days of maintenance restore order to your kit.
tasks.completion_text: {task_name} is complete. Your gear is cleaner, safer, and easier to trust.
tasks.complication_text: {task_name}: hidden wear, dampness, or missing parts force extra attention.
